title: NorvesEditor Bridge Envelope
description: Canonical wire envelope for the NorvesEditor Bridge control channel. Inspired by JSON-RPC request/response/notification patterns but not strict JSON-RPC 2.0. Every Bridge message is one of three kinds: request, response, or event. Per-method and per-event payload schemas are defined in later phases; this schema validates only the envelope structure. additionalProperties is false for alpha so that typos and unplanned fields are rejected; adding a new envelope field is a protocol change that requires review per AGENTS.md.

bridge.description: Protocol marker. Constant for the NorvesEditor Bridge.

id.description: Request/response correlation id. Present on requests and on the matching response.

method.description: Method name on a request. Namespaced, e.g. runtime.play. The method registry is enforced by per-method schemas in later phases.

event.description: Event name on an event envelope. Namespaced, e.g. log.message. The event registry is enforced by per-event schemas in later phases.

params.description: Method or event payload. Shape is validated by per-method/per-event schemas in later phases.

result.description: Success payload on a response. Mutually exclusive with error.

error.description: Error payload on a response. Mutually exclusive with result.

sessionId.description: Optional session id assigned during the handshake. May appear on any kind once a session exists.

seq.description: Optional monotonically increasing per-connection message sequence number.

correlationId.description: Correlation id for request/response pairing. Alpha uses non-empty strings.

methodName.description: Namespaced method name, e.g. bridge.hello or runtime.play.

eventName.description: Namespaced event name, e.g. log.message or bridge.connected.

error.description: Provisional error object. The full error model (code registry, retryability, data shape) is formalized in error-model.md in a later phase. additionalProperties is false for alpha strictness.

code.description: Symbolic, screaming-snake-case error code, e.g. BRIDGE_PROTOCOL_ERROR.

data.description: Optional structured error detail. Shape is error-code specific and defined later.
